raw:
## Completed
Implemented Gate-1 intent propagation to crew prompts after approval. Developer/tester now receive the persisted founder-approved understanding contract when present, and tests cover rendering + wiring.

## Files Changed
- `extensions/foreman/planner.ts` - added `formatIntentContract(plan)`.
- `extensions/foreman/index.ts` - reads persisted plan after Gate 1 approval and injects intent into developer/tester prompts every round.
- `extensions/foreman/crew/developer.md` - notes Founder-approved intent is source of truth.
- `extensions/foreman/crew/tester.md` - notes intent/non-goals judging behavior.
- `extensions/foreman/test/planner_test.sh` - added helper and wiring assertions.

## How To Verify
```bash
grep -q "claude-opus-4-8:xhigh" extensions/foreman/crew/planner.md && bash extensions/foreman/test/planner_timeout_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/planner_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/gates_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/reviewer_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/guard_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/fallback_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/ledger_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/dashboard/test/reader_test.sh
```

## Notes
Verification passed. Working tree contains unrelated pre-existing changes outside the files listed above.
